name: Contact us page
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete 'Contact us' page of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; a contact form with full name, email address, phone number, a subject dropdown, a message textarea and a submit button — every field properly labelled; the ministry's contact details (phone, toll-free number, email, address and working hours); and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
